adhesion_v2_3000K_melt.method: 3000K melt-quench -> amorphous SE on crystalline NCM, CIF start, 5 seeds

results.comp3_to_5: PBC artifact due to SE rhombo 5x1x1 vs NCM 3x3x1 lattice mismatch ±20%

adhesion_v2_3000K_melt.trend: comp1(1.107) > comp2(1.046) -> Br up, Wad down within Li6 family

protocol: 9. Wad = (E_ncm + E_se - E_int) / A  (isolated slab method)

Li6_v5_xyshift_OLD.ISSUE: DEPRECATED: SE 13.6A too thin, Gap=-2.3A = overlap. Wad artificially high.

Li6_v5_xyshift_FIX.notes: SE repeat=(2,2,3) → 624at, 30A thick. Matches Li5.4 (29A). FINAL.

Li5.4_v5_xyshift.notes: SE 248at on 179 A² → 1.39 at/A² — 정상 밀도

cell_matching.density_mismatch: comp2B SE density (0.59) = comp4의 43%! SE thickness 13.6 vs 33.7A. Gap=-2.3A = overlap!
cell_matching.solution: Li6 SE repeat=(2,2,2) → 416at, ~20A thick. All comps then 20-29A range. ADOPTED.

Li6_original.notes: original plan, not used in v5_xyshift

z_cuts_DEPRECATED.reason: z-shift cuts crystalline SE slab -> dangling bonds -> extreme variance

xy_shift.method: SE xy fractional shift (PBC safe), no z cut, 5 seeds per comp

gap_analysis.interpretation: Larger negative gap = deeper SE penetration into NCM = stronger contact = higher Wad. Physical: depends on which SE atoms (Li vs Cl) face NCM O. 5-seed average meaningful.

cross_comparison_issue.problem: Li6 SE 624at/351A2 vs Li5.4 SE 248at/179A2. Different cell areas.
cross_comparison_issue.within_family_Li6: comp1 vs comp2B: Wad difference expected ~7% (expt). Noise from xy-shift may exceed signal. Need 10-20 seeds or report as 'within noise'.
cross_comparison_issue.within_family_Li5.4: comp3 vs comp4 vs comp5: same SE size (248at/179A2). 5 seeds sufficient.
cross_comparison_issue.cross_family: Li6 vs Li5.4: expt difference 84%. Signal >> noise. 5 seeds sufficient. But cell size differs — use v2(3000K melt) for cross-family comparison.

paper_strategy.within_Li5.4: v5 xy-shift results (comp3/4/5, same SE size)
paper_strategy.cross_family: v2 3000K melt results (same NCM, amorphous SE eliminates lattice mismatch)
paper_strategy.Li6_internal: noise range — report as 'similar' or use 10+ seeds

vacuum_sensitivity.finding: UMA gives nonphysical energies with large vacuum
vacuum_sensitivity.cause: UMA trained on bulk/dense systems. Large vacuum = out of distribution.
vacuum_sensitivity.solution: Always use vacuum=30A, expand cell on separation

vacancy_adhesion_mechanism.Li6_no_vacancy: Surface Li saturated -> no extra NCM bonding -> Wad lower
vacancy_adhesion_mechanism.Li5.4_vacancy: Under-coordinated Li near vacancy -> chemical anchor -> pulls NCM O2- -> Wad higher
vacancy_adhesion_mechanism.evidence: Expect Li5.4 xy-shift variance > Li6 variance (vacancy creates site-dependent bonding)
